summary: Iteration 22 - Settlement Tracking & Wallet Sync Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 Exchange operations (BUY, SELL, SWAP, OFF-RAMP) show green success banners with settlement hashes. Settlement hash copy button works. Transaction history displays settlement hashes. No console errors. No red error banners during any operation.
critical_code_review_comments: Settlement hash generation using SHA-256 (0x-prefixed) working correctly
_settlement_record() function properly adds settlement_hash, settlement_status, settlement_timestamp to all transactions
All 4 exchange operations (buy, sell, swap, offramp) return settlement_hash in transaction object
GET /api/neno-exchange/settlement/{tx_id} endpoint returns full settlement verification
POST /api/neno-exchange/wallet-sync accepts external wallet address and returns sync report
GET /api/neno-exchange/portfolio-snapshot returns positions and recent settlements
Frontend displays settlement hash in green banner with copy button
Transaction history shows settlement hashes for all transactions
WalletConnect only initializes if valid project ID is configured (not 'demo-project-id')
Blockchain listener throttled to 60s intervals to avoid rate limits
seed_data_creation: Custom token created during testing with unique symbol
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified all settlement tracking features. Backend generates deterministic settlement hashes (SHA-256) for all exchange operations. Frontend displays settlement hash in green banner with copy button. Transaction history shows settlement hashes. Admin NENO balance ~9940. All E2E tests for Sell 10 NENO, Swap 10 NENO, Off-Ramp 10 NENO passed with verified settlement hashes.

frontend_settlement_display.Settlement hash copy button: PASS - Copy button present and functional
frontend_settlement_display.Transaction history settlement hashes: PASS - Settlement hashes visible in transaction list
frontend_settlement_display.No red error banners: PASS - No error banners during any operation

mocked_apis.note: Settlement hashes are generated deterministically (SHA-256), not on-chain. Wallet sync stores association but does not execute on-chain reads.

console_errors: None - No JavaScript console errors during testing
walletconnect_note: WalletConnect only initializes if REACT_APP_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID is set and not 'demo-project-id'. This prevents console errors from WalletConnect library.
